title: Axle Energy VPP Configuration
description: Configure automatic battery export during Axle Energy grid events. Uses quick settings for immediate response without modifying your schedules.

enabled.title: Enable Axle Energy VPP
enabled.description: Turn on automatic response to grid events

api_key.title: Axle API Key
api_key.description: Your Axle Energy API authentication token

poll_interval_normal.title: Normal Polling Interval
poll_interval_normal.description: Minutes between API checks when no event is active

poll_interval_fast.title: Fast Polling Interval
poll_interval_fast.description: Minutes between API checks when an event is approaching or active

fast_poll_window.title: Fast Poll Window
fast_poll_window.description: Hours before event start to begin fast polling

export_power.title: Export Power Level
export_power.description: Maximum discharge power during events (0-50, where 50 = maximum export)

discharge_target_soc.title: Discharge Target SOC
discharge_target_soc.description: Minimum battery level to discharge to during events (0-100%)
